method_summary: MANGO is an online continual learning framework that balances stability-plasticity through gradient-gating and meta-learned regularization, where replay serves as both training signal and forgetting evaluator.
key_innovation: The meta-adaptive network gradient optimization that combines gradient-gating with meta-learned regularization to control parameter updates based on sensitivity and stability coefficients.

key_results.accuracy: outperforms strong baselines, achieving state-of-the-art results with consistent performance across replay sizes
key_results.backward_transfer: achieves positive Backward Transfer, overcoming forgetting on CLEAR-10

best_result: Outperforms strong baselines, achieving state-of-the-art results with consistent performance across replay sizes, highest accuracy among all baselines, and positive Backward Transfer overcoming forgetting on CLEAR-10
limitations_stated: The paper mentions limitations of existing methods but doesn't explicitly state limitations of MANGO
title: MANGO: Meta-Adaptive Network Gradient Optimization for Online Continual Learning
